candidate_records.value: The Nature’s Rampage 500 Gram Finales deliver a powerful, refined aerial display built around rich gold, silver, and white effects. This 500-gram fireworks cake fires 12 deliberate shots, each designed to fully bloom and linger in the sky for maximum visual impact. Every launch features a combination of golden silk willows, silver comet tails, diamond glitter effects, and classic chrysanthemum breaks. Golden pine needles with white glitter add depth and texture, while silver and gold transitions create a clean, polished finale look. The firing pace allows each effect to stand on its own, making this cake ideal for closing sequences or stacking multiple units for a balanced, professional-style finish. Nature’s Rampage is built for buyers who want a high-quality 500 gram finale that emphasizes elegance, clarity, and strong aerial presence rather than rapid-fire chaos. The gold, silver, and white color palette makes it especially well suited for milestone celebrations and end-of-show mome
